schemaNote: Mirrors decision-18 QueryPlan; Grounded.id widened to number | number[] (see scorer.spec.md, finding 1).
validationNote: E11: at eval start every Grounded.id is checked against the loaded catalog. A missing id => 'stale gold -- re-author'; that cell is skipped, never counted as an AI failure. catalogVersion is a placeholder until the build pipeline (plan step 2) emits a real version string.
